name: Tillamook Country Smoker (tcsmoker.com)
message: Tillamook Country Smoker (TCS) is a long-standing producer of high-quality beef jerky and meat sticks distributed primarily through grocery, convenience mass, specialty and e-commerce channels.We are ready to upload more than 14 GB of internal corporate documents including: SSNs, inside financial and medical information, employee contact phones and emails, etc.
